name: Electric Power Distribution
rationale: Lowest composite — strong ODI (5.66) and predictable contracts but crushed by low job coverage (5.0, DSO owns dispatch + O&M; EPC role limited to 4/8 steps), high constraint penalty (4.5; 6 mitigable inc. 1 high requiring Section 11 EnWG recognition), and ABB/Siemens/Hitachi/Nidec near-monopoly on DSO procurement (4.0).
